reason: fix verified: On the finding's malicious CLI condition, run() first calls _validate_worker_address(args.worker_address) and _parse_positive_int(args.lines); metacharacters in worker_address fail the host:port regex and metacharacters in lines fail positive-integer parsing, returning failure before tail, while accepted values reach subprocess.run as ["tail", "-n", str(lines), log_path] rather than shell text. (issue #190)
